overall.description: A cinematic nighttime journey through Saint Denis from Red Dead Redemption 2, featuring wet cobblestone streets illuminated by gas lamps. The camera moves along tram tracks through a historic New Orleans-style city, navigating intersections with horse-drawn carriages and trams in a atmospheric, rain-soaked urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined residential avenue with tram tracks

events.description: oncoming tram with headlight becomes clearly visible approaching on the tracks

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward along the tram tracks through the tree-lined avenue toward the oncoming tram

notable_agents.action: tram approaching on the tracks with bright headlight visible in the distance

entered.detail: large two-story stone building with columns and warm lit windows
rows of mature trees with white-painted trunks forming a canopy over the tracks
metal rails embedded in wet cobblestone ground reflecting street lights
dark horse-drawn carriage parked near the mansion entrance
ornate black lampposts casting warm yellow gas light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow, tree-lined avenue in a historic district at night. The camera moves forward along tram tracks flanked by white-trunked trees and a large mansion on the left. An oncoming tram approaches in the distance, its headlight cutting through the darkness, while the wet cobblestones reflect the warm glow of gas street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with tram line crossings

events.description: camera turns left at the intersection to navigate around the oncoming tram
green tram with Saint Denis signage passes by on the right side
horse-drawn carriage with white horses crosses the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: navigating left through the cobblestone intersection, yielding to the passing tram and crossing carriage

notable_agents.action: green tram passing through the intersection with 'Saint Denis' text visible on its side
horse-drawn carriage with two white horses and a driver in a brown coat crossing the street

entered.detail: large historic building with wraparound balcony and multiple lit windows at the intersection corner
wet cobblestone street with multiple tram track crossings creating complex rail patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a wide cobblestone intersection, leaving the tree-lined avenue. A green tram passes closely on the right, revealing 'Saint Denis' lettering, while a horse-drawn carriage with white horses crosses from the left. The scene opens up to show a grand corner building with ornate balconies as the camera navigates the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with covered tram shelter

events.description: approaching the covered tram shelter with bench seating on the right side
tram passes by the shelter moving in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing straight along the commercial street, passing the tram shelter where a tram is stopped

entered.detail: row of two-story historic commercial buildings with balconies and shop fronts
continuous facade of historic buildings with lit windows and architectural details
covered waiting shelter with wooden bench and ornate roof structure
planters with purple flowers alongside the tram shelter

segments.scene_description: Moving along a medium-width commercial street, the camera passes historic buildings with balconies on both sides. A covered tram shelter with a wooden bench appears on the right, surrounded by flower beds. A tram passes by the shelter, momentarily occupying the right side of the frame before the camera continues down the wet cobblestone street.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with tram lines

events.description: horse-drawn carriage becomes visible ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the open street toward a distant carriage, maintaining steady speed along the tracks

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving slowly ahead on the tracks in the same direction

entered.detail: small trees planted in rectangular stone planters along the track median

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down the historic commercial street, having passed the tram shelter. The camera moves toward a horse-drawn carriage visible in the distance ahead. Tree planters line the center median, and the wet cobblestones continue to reflect the warm gas lamp light from the buildings on either side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked historic district that transitions from a quiet, tree-lined avenue into a bustling commercial thoroughfare. It begins by gliding along tram tracks flanked by white-trunked trees and a large mansion, with the headlight of an oncoming tram cutting through the darkness of the wet cobblestones. As the camera turns left into a wide intersection, the scene opens up to reveal a grand corner building with ornate balconies while a green Saint Denis tram and a horse-drawn carriage cross the path. The movement then shifts onto a medium-width commercial street, passing historic balconies and a covered wooden tram shelter surrounded by flower beds. Finally, the camera continues down the reflective street, moving past center median planters toward a distant horse-drawn carriage under the warm glow of gas lamps.
